description: CompositionWhite round neck sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, with circular print and green piping around the neckline and arm holesWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet the boho chic look with this printed white tee from the Collage collection of jealous 21. The simple design of the top is the perfect backdrop for happy circular prints in vibrant shades of lime green, lavender, pink and blue. The bigger circular graphic on the chest with butterflies acts as a focal point for this playful top. Team this with white pants or denim shorts for a real summery look.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.8", Chest-33"
